requirement_topic.en: PNG Power Grid Connection — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: PNG Power并网——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: PNG Power併網——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V參數

summary.en: Grid-tied solar PV inverters in Papua New Guinea must be reviewed against PNG Power Ltd project connection requirements and any standards adopted or referenced through NISIT and project specifications. The practical IEC baseline for PV inverter grid connection is IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface characteristics. Papua New Guinea operates at 50 Hz with nominal 240 V single-phase and 415 V three-phase supply, reflecting Australia/New Zealand influence in electrical practice. This is the same frequency as China but not the same voltage: China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. Inverter firmware, voltage protection thresholds, reconnection delays, and ride-through settings must therefore be validated for Papua New Guinea's 240/415 V, 50 Hz grid and for weak-grid or microgrid conditions common in mountainous and off-grid areas.
summary.zh: 巴布亚新几内亚并网太阳能光伏逆变器须按PNG Power Ltd项目接入要求以及NISIT采纳或项目规格引用的标准进行审查。光伏逆变器并网的实际IEC基准通常为IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口特性。巴布亚新几内亚电网为50 Hz，标称单相240 V、三相415 V，电气实践受澳大利亚/新西兰影响。这与中国频率相同，但电压不同：中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。因此，逆变器固件、电压保护阈值、重连延迟和穿越设置须针对巴布亚新几内亚240/415 V、50 Hz电网以及山区和离网地区常见的弱电网或微电网条件进行验证。
summary.zht: 巴布亞紐幾內亞併網太陽能光伏逆變器須按PNG Power Ltd項目接入要求以及NISIT採納或項目規格引用的標準進行審查。光伏逆變器併網的實際IEC基準通常為IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面特性。巴布亞紐幾內亞電網為50 Hz，標稱單相240 V、三相415 V，電氣實務受澳洲/紐西蘭影響。這與中國頻率相同，但電壓不同：中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。因此，逆變器韌體、電壓保護閾值、重連延遲和穿越設置須針對巴布亞紐幾內亞240/415 V、50 Hz電網以及山區和離網地區常見的弱電網或微電網條件進行驗證。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
PNG Power Ltd project-specific grid-connection and commissioning requirements
Papua New Guinea low-voltage supply context: 50 Hz, 240 V single-phase, 415 V three-phase

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected PV inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408-2021 for PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These Chinese documents are based on China grid conditions and do not create automatic acceptance by PNG Power, NISIT, ICCC, or project owners in Papua New Guinea. The critical parameter difference is voltage: China uses 220/380 V at 50 Hz, while Papua New Guinea uses 240/415 V at 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括光伏电站并网用GB/T 19964-2024、光伏并网逆变器技术规范NB/T 32004、光伏并网逆变器技术要求GB/T 37408-2021及国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国文件基于中国电网条件，不会被PNG Power、NISIT、ICCC或巴布亚新几内亚项目业主自动接受。关键参数差异是电压：中国为50 Hz 220/380 V，而巴布亚新几内亚为50 Hz 240/415 V。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括光伏電站併網用GB/T 19964-2024、光伏併網逆變器技術規範NB/T 32004、光伏併網逆變器技術要求GB/T 37408-2021及國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國文件基於中國電網條件，不會被PNG Power、NISIT、ICCC或巴布亞紐幾內亞項目業主自動接受。關鍵參數差異是電壓：中國為50 Hz 220/380 V，而巴布亞紐幾內亞為50 Hz 240/415 V。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid certificates do not satisfy Papua New Guinea project grid-connection review by themselves. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, inverter firmware parameter documentation for 240/415 V at 50 Hz, and commissioning settings acceptable to PNG Power or the project utility. Because Papua New Guinea has many off-grid, microgrid, mining, LNG, and mountainous installations, confirm whether site-specific weak-grid, generator-backed, or island-mode operation requirements apply before shipping the inverter.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证书本身不满足巴布亚新几内亚项目并网审查。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、针对50 Hz 240/415 V的逆变器固件参数文件，以及PNG Power或项目电力公司可接受的调试设置。由于巴布亚新几内亚存在大量离网、微电网、矿业、LNG和山区应用，发货前须确认项目是否适用弱电网、发电机后备或孤岛运行等现场特定要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證書本身不滿足巴布亞紐幾內亞項目併網審查。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島測試證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、針對50 Hz 240/415 V的逆變器韌體參數文件，以及PNG Power或項目電力公司可接受的調試設置。由於巴布亞紐幾內亞存在大量離網、微電網、礦業、LNG和山區應用，發貨前須確認項目是否適用弱電網、發電機後備或孤島運行等現場特定要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at project level where PNG Power Ltd or another project utility requires grid-connection review; IEC evidence is commonly required by utility, donor, EPC, or owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid operator requirements but is not automatically accepted for Papua New Guinea grid connection

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Papua New Guinea grid connection as a separate project approval from China domestic grid compliance. Provide IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence and validate inverter settings for Papua New Guinea's 240/415 V at 50 Hz grid; the frequency matches China, but the nominal voltage does not. Confirm current PNG Power or project utility connection requirements before finalising the equipment package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将巴布亚新几内亚并网视为独立于中国国内并网合规的项目审批。请提供IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，并针对巴布亚新几内亚240/415 V 50 Hz电网验证逆变器设置；频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同。在最终确定设备合规包前，请核实PNG Power或项目电力公司的现行接入要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將巴布亞紐幾內亞併網視為獨立於中國國內併網合規的項目審批。請提供IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，並針對巴布亞紐幾內亞240/415 V 50 Hz電網驗證逆變器設置；頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同。在最終確定設備合規包前，請核實PNG Power或項目電力公司的現行接入要求。
